title: Create: GearBound
description: New stuff for Create-Fabric(and forge) life!
body:
# (╯✧▽✧)╯  CREATE: GEARBOUND!  ヽ(>∀<☆)ノ
       


![funnyimagelogololxd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6fbedb4cbafdee8512eff224c0f269da90e1381.png)

Create: GearBound is a simple [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) Fabric addon  
that adds some things my friends and I want to get!  

There are new ways to move around, mine your blocks, and beat up your enemies!   
Also some cool unique upgrades for those items!  

Hope you enjoy my little addon ⸜(*ˊᗜˋ*)⸝

This mod (if you don’t see it lol) is HIGHLY inspired by  
[Stuff'N Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions), but now it’s for Fabric!  

<details>  
<summary> Spoiler ∑(O_O;)</summary>

(Yeah, actually at first it was planned like a port (??) but in the end, it became an independent addon!) 

</details>
